sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ سَارَةُ أَنْ تَفْتَحَ مَتْجَرًا صَغِيرًا لِلزُّهُورِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Sara je odlučila otvoriti malu cvjećaru u gradu.
sentences.translationEn: Sarah decided to open a small flower shop in the city.

sentences.arabic: دَرَسَتِ السُّوقَ جَيِّدًا قَبْلَ بَدْءِ مَشْرُوعِهَا الْخَاصِّ.
sentences.translation: Dobro je proučila tržište prije pokretanja sopstvenog projekta.
sentences.translationEn: She studied the market well before starting her private project.

sentences.arabic: الْآنَ، هِيَ تَبِيعُ أَزْهَارًا جَمِيلَةً لِكَثِيرٍ مِنَ الزَّبَائِنِ.
sentences.translation: Sada ona prodaje prelijepo cvijeće mnogim mušterijama.
sentences.translationEn: Now, she sells beautiful flowers to many customers.

sentences.arabic: رِيَادَةُ الْأَعْمَالِ طَرِيقَةٌ رَائِعَةٌ لِتَحْقِيقِ الْأَحْلَامِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Preduzetništvo je sjajan način za ostvarenje ličnih snova.
sentences.translationEn: Entrepreneurship is a great way to achieve personal dreams.
